prompt:
Create a NEW Muha Meds 'Members Raffle' hero card graphic — a square 1:1 raffle entry card designed to live at the top of an in-app raffle page. FRESH original composition (do NOT mimic any reference exactly — use them only for aesthetic and assets). Aspect ratio 1:1 / 2880×2880. Aesthetic: cinematic red/gold/cream/black palette of REFERENCE 1 (5-day countdown poster) — wet-Miami-pavement-at-night, warm amber/red atmospheric glow, deep blacks, gold star accents, condensed cream serif lettering, gold metallic finishes. NO Vice-City synthwave pink/teal neons.

IMPORTANT: do NOT draw any decorative border frame around the perimeter. Edge-to-edge bleed.

Fresh composition (designed specifically for the 1:1 ratio — NOT a square crop of an existing 3:4 poster):
- Upper-LEFT corner: Muha 'M' gold logo from REFERENCE 2 (use as-is, gold metallic, medium-prominent — about 18% of canvas height).
- Upper-RIGHT corner: a small gold tag/badge reading 'OFFICIAL ENTRY' in tiny condensed cream all-caps, with a thin gold border around it.
- Top center band: small row of gold stars + cream all-caps subhead between two gold rules: 'MUHA MEMBERS RAFFLE'.
- Mid section (the hero): a dynamic three-quarter-front view of a red Dodge Challenger EXACTLY matching REFERENCE 1's car (same body, lighting, wet pavement reflections). Position the Challenger angled across the lower-mid portion of the canvas — coming toward the viewer from the right side, headlamps glowing warm. NO 'SRT' badge prominent. Around the front wheel and on the wet pavement: a few stacks of US dollar bills ($100s) catching warm amber glow.
- Lower-LEFT (overlapping into the scene): bold cream condensed serif headline stacked on TWO lines:
   • Line 1: '$25,000+'
   • Line 2: 'AND DODGE CHALLENGER'
  Treatment: clean smooth cream lettering with a SUBTLE warm-RED outer glow halo behind the type (low intensity, ~25% opacity, gentle Gaussian blur). Minimal/no grunge texture — keep the type crisp and readable. CRITICAL — do NOT include 'SRT', do NOT include '2025' or any year, do NOT use '$75,000+'. Headline reads exactly '$25,000+ AND DODGE CHALLENGER'.
- Bottom strip: small cream all-caps subline 'LEARN MORE' centered, with a subtle gold underline.
- Background: cinematic Miami nighttime skyline silhouette with palm trees flanking the edges, deep blacks and warm red/amber neon glow, wet-asphalt reflections — bleeding to all four edges with NO frame.

Ultra-sharp render, balanced 1:1 composition (not a tall poster awkwardly cropped). Crisp typography with subtle red glow. No watermarks, no extra text beyond what is specified. NO border frame.
